response.justification: The candidate is an experienced generalist with a long career in web and full-stack development, but he misses nearly every hard requirement for this embedded security role: no Japanese proficiency (native-level is required), no embedded LAN-switch or networking-security experience (MACsec, 802.1X, L2/L3), no Linux kernel investigation or modification background, and only brief, dated C experience from a six-month stint in 2014-2015. His strengths in TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang do not transfer to firmware development for switch products.
strengths: 18+ years of broad software experience across web, mobile, desktop, and some embedded-adjacent work
Some C/C++ background (NI LabWindows/CVI components, C++ audio thesis) and working Linux familiarity
Strong engineering culture: TDD, CI/CD, open-source test tooling, and knowledge-sharing
concerns: No Japanese language ability listed; native-level Japanese is a hard requirement
No embedded networking or security-domain experience (MACsec, 802.1X, switch operation, kernel modification)
C proficiency is minimal and dated; recent career is centered on TypeScript/Node.js web development

key_factors.factor: Limited and dated C / no Linux kernel work
